54f1d69c-a3d0-498b-a35f-429046a2f615.label: text_chunk
54f1d69c-a3d0-498b-a35f-429046a2f615.text:
DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY

NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII)

I, _______________________________________, an individual official, employee, consultant, or subcontractor of or to _____________________ (the Authorized Entity), intending to be legally bound, hereby consent to the terms in this Agreement in consideration of my being granted conditional access to certain information, specified below, that is owned by, produced by, or in the possession of the United States Government.

01cbdd62-953a-4ed1-a89f-4f71d18d5dc7.label: text_chunk
01cbdd62-953a-4ed1-a89f-4f71d18d5dc7.text:
(Signer will acknowledge the category or categories of information that he or she may have access to, and the signer’s willingness to comply with the standards for protection by placing his or her initials in front of the applicable category or categories.)
Initials:

42b29ca0-45ce-45bc-829e-8a5831ce76f2.label: text_chunk
42b29ca0-45ce-45bc-829e-8a5831ce76f2.text: I attest that I am familiar with, and I will comply with all requirements of the PCII program set out in the Critical Infrastructure Information Act of 2002 (CII Act) (Title II, Subtitle B, of the Homeland Security Act of 2002, Public Law 107-296, 196 Stat. 2135, 6 USC 101 et seq.

a97f4db1-48e3-45e4-bff8-ebd3c90846f7.label: text_chunk
a97f4db1-48e3-45e4-bff8-ebd3c90846f7.text: ), as amended, the implementing regulations thereto (6 CFR Part 29), as amended, and the applicable PCII Procedures Manual, as amended, and with any such requirements that may be officially communicated to me by the PCII Program Manager or the PCII Program Manager’s designee.

565c823d-e166-4a57-9be4-04747b664a44.label: text_chunk
565c823d-e166-4a57-9be4-04747b664a44.text: Sensitive Security Information (SSI) Initials: I attest that I am familiar with, and I will comply with the standards for access, dissemination, handling, and safeguarding of SSI information as cited in this Agreement and in accordance with 49 CFR Part 1520, “Protection of Sensitive Security Information,” “Policies and Procedures for Safeguarding and Control of SSI,” as amended, and any supplementary guidance issued by an authorized official of the Department of Homeland Security.

e7e380ee-ad7f-41e7-b2bd-4b2151eebea8.label: text_chunk
e7e380ee-ad7f-41e7-b2bd-4b2151eebea8.text:
Other Sensitive but Unclassified (SBU) Initials:


As used in this Agreement, sensitive but unclassified information is an over-arching term that covers any information, not otherwise indicated above, which the loss of, misuse of, or unauthorized access to or modification of could adversely affect the national interest or the conduct of Federal programs, or the privacy to which individuals are entitled under Section 552a of Title 5, as amended,

2b18cff8-3994-467e-96d1-36648510c0a5.label: text_chunk
2b18cff8-3994-467e-96d1-36648510c0a5.text: but which has not been specifically authorized under criteria established by an Executive Order or an Act of Congress to be kept secret in the interest of national defense or foreign policy.

f759bdf9-548b-4f06-ac9a-b4081691e534.label: text_chunk
f759bdf9-548b-4f06-ac9a-b4081691e534.text: This includes information categorized by DHS or other government agencies as: For Official Use Only (FOUO); Official Use Only (OUO); Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI); Limited Official Use (LOU); Law Enforcement Sensitive (LES); Safeguarding Information (SGI); Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information (UCNI); and any other identifier used by other government agencies to categorize information as sensitive but unclassified.

23b9a0d3-2fd7-41f4-8414-62fb1b1081b2.label: text_chunk
23b9a0d3-2fd7-41f4-8414-62fb1b1081b2.text: I attest that I am familiar with, and I will comply with the standards for access, dissemination, handling, and safeguarding of the information to which I am granted access as cited in this Agreement and in accordance with the guidance provided to me relative to the specific category of information.1.

4ad07139-37e8-49b4-9b9d-c308d2b29fc4.label: text_chunk
4ad07139-37e8-49b4-9b9d-c308d2b29fc4.text:
I hereby acknowledge that I have received a security indoctrination concerning the nature and protection of information to which I have been provided conditional access, including the procedures to be followed in ascertaining whether other persons to whom I contemplate disclosing this information have been approved for access to it, and that I understand these procedures.I understand and agree to the following terms and conditions of my access to the information indicated above:
2.

596ebe23-ffe1-4e8c-8a8c-4f7dc5909a12.label: text_chunk
596ebe23-ffe1-4e8c-8a8c-4f7dc5909a12.text: By being granted conditional access to the information indicated above, the United States Government has placed special confidence and trust in me and I am obligated to protect this information from unauthorized disclosure, in accordance with the terms of this Agreement and the laws, regulations, and directives applicable to the specifi c categories of information to which I am granted access.3.

41b28da9-27b2-443f-8f6c-0baf1eed58e7.label: text_chunk
41b28da9-27b2-443f-8f6c-0baf1eed58e7.text: I attest that I understand my responsibilities and that I am familiar with and will comply with the standards for protecting such information that I may have access to in accordance with the terms of this Agreement and the laws, regulations, and/or directives applicable to the specifi c categories of information to which I am granted access.

7f96eefe-5184-4bfa-90d9-0836d9d8c36e.label: text_chunk
7f96eefe-5184-4bfa-90d9-0836d9d8c36e.text:
I understand that the United States Government may conduct inspections, at any time or place, for the purpose of ensuring compliance with the conditions for access, dissemination, handling and safeguarding information under this Agreement.DHS Form 11000-6 (08-04)
Page 1
8. If I violate the terms and conditions of this Agreement, such violation may result in the cancellation of my conditional access to the information covered by this Agreement.

e2d3a960-10e4-4a7e-88c1-71522407d2ed.label: text_chunk
e2d3a960-10e4-4a7e-88c1-71522407d2ed.text: This may serve as a basis for denying me conditional access to other types of information, to include classified national security information.4. I will not disclose or release any information provided to me pursuant to this Agreement without proper authority or authorization. Should situations arise that warrant the disclosure or release of such information I will do so only under approved circumstances and in accordance with the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the specific categories of information.

2c8de773-3cac-4e6a-85a8-a9ababf59545.label: text_chunk
2c8de773-3cac-4e6a-85a8-a9ababf59545.text: I will honor and comply with any and all dissemination restrictions cited or verbally relayed to me by the proper authority.5.

c76c2bd5-e027-4ac6-89f9-538dd2f8f38e.label: text_chunk
c76c2bd5-e027-4ac6-89f9-538dd2f8f38e.text: (a) For PCII - (1) Upon the completion of my engagement as an employee, consultant, or subcontractor under the contract, or the completion of my work on the PCII Program, whichever occurs first, I will surrender promptly to the PCII Program Manager or his designee, or to the appropriate PCII officer, PCII of any type whatsoever that is in my possession.

2504b12b-bc19-4680-a0b6-7660e85ab895.label: text_chunk
2504b12b-bc19-4680-a0b6-7660e85ab895.text: (2) If the Authorized Entity is a United States Government contractor performing services in support of the PCII Program, I will not request, obtain, maintain, or use PCII unless the PCII Program Manager or Program Manager’s designee has first made in writing, with respect to the contractor, the certification as provided for in Section 29.8(c) of the implementing regulations to the CII Act, as amended.

060b4989-b22e-4e4f-a4e4-cbd00854c788.label: text_chunk
060b4989-b22e-4e4f-a4e4-cbd00854c788.text: (b) For SSI and SBU - I hereby agree that material which I have in my possession and containing information covered by this Agreement, will be handled and safeguarded in a manner that affords sufficient protection to prevent the unauthorized disclosure of or inadvertent access to such information, consistent with the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the specific categories of information.

046234c7-3e9c-4849-93bd-6f62dd9cefa9.label: text_chunk
046234c7-3e9c-4849-93bd-6f62dd9cefa9.text:
I agree that I shall return all information to which I have had access or which is in my possession 1) upon demand by an authorized individual; and/or 2) upon the conclusion of my duties, association, or support to DHS; and/or 3) upon the determination that my official duties do not require further access to such information.6.

 I hereby agree that I will not alter or remove markings, which indicate a category of information or require specific handling instructions,

d0327022-dea9-4385-90cd-f2be42d2568d.label: text_chunk
d0327022-dea9-4385-90cd-f2be42d2568d.text: from any material I may come in contact with, in the case of SSI or SBU, unless such alteration or removal is consistent with the requirements set forth in the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the specific category of information or, in the case of PCII, unless such alteration or removal is authorized by the PCII Program Manager or the PCII Program Manager’s designee.

35dcba73-e19d-47bb-8a50-1baf747abe53.label: text_chunk
35dcba73-e19d-47bb-8a50-1baf747abe53.text: I agree that if I use information from a sensitive document or other medium, I will carry forward any markings or other required restrictions to derivative products, and will protect them in the same matter as the original.7.

a1897bcd-973c-49d8-8285-a818cda15cc9.label: text_chunk
a1897bcd-973c-49d8-8285-a818cda15cc9.text:
I hereby agree that I shall promptly report to the appropriate official, in accordance with the guidance issued for the applicable category of information, any loss, theft, misuse, misplacement, unauthorized disclosure, or other security violation, I have knowledge of and whether or not I am personally involved.

 I also understand that my anonymity will be kept to the extent possible when reporting security violations.9.

22ae9a53-2e5f-4110-836f-12e229c5faa7.label: text_chunk
22ae9a53-2e5f-4110-836f-12e229c5faa7.text: (a) With respect to SSI and SBU, I hereby assign to the United States Government all royalties, remunerations, and emoluments that have resulted, will result, or may result from any disclosure, publication, or revelation of the information not consistent with the terms of this Agreement.

7ebd9f3a-877a-43f7-9b83-66a4e0032396.label: text_chunk
7ebd9f3a-877a-43f7-9b83-66a4e0032396.text: (b) With respect to PCII I hereby assign to the entity owning the PCII and the United States Government, all royalties, remunerations, and emoluments that have resulted, will result, or may result from any disclosure, publication, or revelation of PCII not consistent with the terms of this Agreement.10. This Agreement is made and intended for the benefit of the United States Government and may be enforced by the United States Government or the Authorized Entity.

a6daf1da-246e-4769-b57c-7ba2eb51ca42.label: text_chunk
a6daf1da-246e-4769-b57c-7ba2eb51ca42.text: By granting me conditional access to information in this context, the United States Government and, with respect to PCII, the Authorized Entity, may seek any remedy available to it to enforce this Agreement including, but not limited to, application for a court order prohibiting disclosure of information in breach of this Agreement.

52cd9795-3ab5-4165-b149-787ca8a0248d.label: text_chunk
52cd9795-3ab5-4165-b149-787ca8a0248d.text: I understand that if I violate the terms and conditions of this Agreement, I could be subjected to administrative, disciplinary, civil, or criminal action, as appropriate, under the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the category of information involved and neither the United States Government nor the Authorized Entity have waived any statutory or common law evidentiary privileges or protections that they may assert in any administrative or court proceeding to protect any sensitive information to which I have been given conditional access under the terms of this Agreement.

b8b172fa-b031-401a-a1e4-a6b35b980a5a.label: text_chunk
b8b172fa-b031-401a-a1e4-a6b35b980a5a.text:
DHS Form 11000-6 (08-04)
Page 2
11. Unless and until I am released in writing by an authorized representative of the Department of Homeland Security (if permissible for the particular category of information), I understand that all conditions and obligations imposed upon me by this Agreement apply during the time that I am granted conditional access, and at all times thereafter.12. Each provision of this Agreement is severable.

3ef323f1-3d4d-4d3b-9575-b91c67ccaa11.label: text_chunk
3ef323f1-3d4d-4d3b-9575-b91c67ccaa11.text: If a court should find any provision of this Agreement to be unenforceable, all other provisions shall remain in full force and effect.13. My execution of this Agreement shall not nullify or affect in any manner any other secrecy or non-disclosure Agreement which I have executed or may execute with the United States Government or any of its departments or agencies.14.

f2d4c1ec-08fe-490d-b341-46fbdd4059cf.label: text_chunk
f2d4c1ec-08fe-490d-b341-46fbdd4059cf.text:
These restrictions are consistent with and do not supersede, conflict with, or otherwise alter the employee obligations, rights, or liabilities created by Executive Order No.

 12958, as amended; Section 7211 of Title 5, United States Code (governing disclosures to Congress); Section 1034 of Title 10, United States Code, as amended by the Military Whistleblower Protection Act (governing disclosure to Congress by members of the military);

d4a2e37c-a379-4a9f-b544-493c4a266022.label: text_chunk
d4a2e37c-a379-4a9f-b544-493c4a266022.text:
Section 2302(b)(8) of Title 5, United States Code, as amended by the Whistleblower Protection Act (governing disclosures of illegality, waste, fraud, abuse or public health or safety threats); the Intelligence Identities Protection Act of 1982 (50 USC 421 et seq.

)

311be8d8-af6a-4a18-a8dc-2a1e877f8896.label: text_chunk
311be8d8-af6a-4a18-a8dc-2a1e877f8896.text: (governing disclosures that could expose confidential Government agents); and the statutes which protect against disclosure that may compromise the national security, including Sections 641, 793, 794, 798, and 952 of Title 18, United States Code, and Section 4(b) of the Subversive Activities Act of 1950 (50 USC 783(b)).

0caa1d60-80cd-443b-b856-21a72dcc4438.label: text_chunk
0caa1d60-80cd-443b-b856-21a72dcc4438.text: The definitions, requirements, obligations, rights, sanctions, and liabilities created by said Executive Order and listed statutes are incorporated into this agreement and are controlling.15. Signing this Agreement does not bar disclosures to Congress or to an authorized official of an executive agency or the Department of Justice that are essential to reporting a substantial violation of law.16. I represent and warrant that I have the authority to enter into this Agreement.17.

ca5a87b0-3c6a-4a24-9517-609a13e44d7b.label: text_chunk
ca5a87b0-3c6a-4a24-9517-609a13e44d7b.text: I have read this Agreement carefully and my questions, if any, have been answered. I acknowledge that the briefing officer has made available to me any laws, regulations, or directives referenced in this document so that I may read them at this time, if I so choose.

2121fc39-474b-47dc-9bd5-660c88e7eca1.label: text_chunk
2121fc39-474b-47dc-9bd5-660c88e7eca1.text:

Signature: Typed/Printed Name: Government/Department/Agency/Business Address Telephone Number: Signature: WITNESS:

properties.relationship_description: The Department of Homeland Security is responsible for overseeing the conditions and obligations imposed upon individuals as part of the Agreement related to conditional access.

properties.entity_description: The United States Government is the federal government of the United States, responsible for the administration of federal laws and policies. It consists of three branches: executive, legislative, and judicial.

properties.relationship_description: The Department of Homeland Security is a federal agency that operates under the authority of the United States Government, thus it is overseen by the government and is responsible for implementing policies related to national security.
The signer acknowledges the category or categories of information they may have access to, indicating a direct relationship between the signer and the information categories.

properties.entity_description: Information categories refer to the different types of information that the signer may have access to, which require acknowledgment and compliance with protection standards.

properties.relationship_description: The signer acknowledges the category or categories of information they may have access to, indicating a direct relationship between the signer and the information categories.
The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.

The PCII program is established under the provisions of the Critical Infrastructure Information Act of 2002, which outlines the legal framework for the protection of critical infrastructure information.

properties.entity_description: The Homeland Security Act of 2002 is a U.S. federal law that established the Department of Homeland Security and aimed to improve the nation's security against terrorist threats and other hazards.

properties.relationship_description: Sensitive but unclassified information is related to Section 552a of Title 5 because the latter provides the legal framework that protects individual privacy rights, which is a key aspect of the sensitive but unclassified information.

The PCII program is established under the provisions of the Critical Infrastructure Information Act of 2002, which outlines the legal framework for the protection of critical infrastructure information.

properties.entity_description: The PCII Program Manager is an official responsible for overseeing the management and protection of Protected Critical Infrastructure Information.

The PCII Procedures Manual is a formal document that outlines the procedures and guidelines for managing Protected Critical Infrastructure Information, including requirements for handling, sharing, and protecting sensitive data.

6 CFR Part 29 refers to a specific part of the Code of Federal Regulations that contains implementing regulations related to the Protected Critical Infrastructure Information program, detailing legal requirements and compliance standards.

properties.relationship_description: The PCII Program Manager ensures that the activities and procedures of the PCII program comply with the regulations set forth in 6 CFR Part 29.
The PCII Program Manager oversees the implementation of the PCII Procedures Manual, ensuring that the guidelines and procedures outlined in the manual are followed.
The Department of Homeland Security is responsible for the protection and regulation of Sensitive Security Information, ensuring that it is handled according to established standards and guidelines.
The Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995 establishes guidelines that affect how forms like DHS Form 11000-6 are created and managed, ensuring they comply with federal paperwork reduction standards.

Sensitive but unclassified information is related to Section 552a of Title 5 because the latter provides the legal framework that protects individual privacy rights, which is a key aspect of the sensitive but unclassified information.

properties.entity_description: Section 552a of Title 5 is a legal provision that protects the privacy of individuals by regulating the collection, maintenance, use, and dissemination of personal information by federal agencies.
An official directive issued by the President of the United States that manages the operations of the federal government and has the force of law.

An Act of Congress is a statute enacted by the United States Congress. It represents the legislative authority of the federal government and can establish laws, regulations, and policies that govern various aspects of American life.

properties.relationship_description: Both the Executive Order and the Act of Congress are mechanisms through which the U.S. government establishes legal frameworks and policies, particularly concerning national defense and foreign policy.
An authorized individual is someone who has the authority to demand the return of information from individuals who have had access to it, particularly in relation to the duties associated with DHS.

properties.entity_description: For Official Use Only (FOUO) is a designation used by government agencies to identify sensitive information that is not classified but should be restricted from public disclosure.
Official Use Only (OUO) is a classification that indicates information is sensitive and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) refers to information that, if disclosed, could harm national security or the safety of individuals.
Limited Official Use (LOU) is a classification for information that is sensitive and should be limited to specific individuals or groups.
Law Enforcement Sensitive (LES) information is data that, if disclosed, could compromise law enforcement operations or investigations.
Safeguarding Information (SGI) refers to sensitive information that requires protection to prevent unauthorized access or disclosure.
Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information (UCNI) is information related to nuclear facilities or materials that is unclassified but requires protection from unauthorized disclosure.

properties.relationship_description: The DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to ensure national security and public safety.
The DHS categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to protect sensitive information from public disclosure.
The briefing officer is responsible for making available the laws, regulations, or directives referenced in the Agreement, thus providing essential information related to the document.
Authority is necessary for the disclosure of Information, as it determines who has the right to release sensitive data.
Conditional access refers to the security measures that determine who can access sensitive information based on specific criteria.

properties.entity_description: Data or knowledge communicated or received, which can include classified national security information and other types of sensitive information.

properties.relationship_description: The security indoctrination process educates individuals about the nature and protection of sensitive information.

properties.entity_description: Established methods or protocols that must be followed to ensure the proper handling and disclosure of sensitive information.

properties.relationship_description: Conditional access refers to the security measures that determine who can access sensitive information based on specific criteria.
The security indoctrination process educates individuals about the nature and protection of sensitive information.
The United States Government has the authority to enforce laws and regulations that govern the actions of the Authorized Entity in relation to sensitive information.

properties.entity_description: A system of rules created and enforced through social or governmental institutions to regulate behavior, which governs the disclosure of information.
Specific rules or directives made and maintained by an authority to regulate conduct within a particular area, including the handling of sensitive information.

properties.relationship_description: The Agreement outlines the responsibilities and standards for protecting Information that the individual has access to, indicating that the Agreement governs how Information should be handled.

properties.entity_description: A specific form used by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for various administrative purposes, which is part of the paperwork regulated under the Paperwork Reduction Act.

properties.relationship_description: The United States Government regulates the use and compliance of DHS Form 11000-6, which is related to information handling and safeguarding under specific agreements.
The authority is responsible for enforcing dissemination restrictions, ensuring that individuals comply with the rules and guidelines set forth.

properties.entity_description: Official instructions or orders issued by an authority that guide actions and decisions, particularly in relation to information disclosure.

properties.relationship_description: The Agreement outlines the terms under which Information can be disclosed or released, establishing the conditions for handling sensitive data.
The Department of Homeland Security may require individuals or entities to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement to protect sensitive information related to national security and public safety.
The PCII Program Manager oversees the PCII program, indicating a management relationship where the manager is responsible for the program's operations and compliance.

properties.entity_description: An Authorized Entity refers to any organization or body that has been granted permission to access or manage sensitive information under specific terms and conditions.
The Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII) Program, which is designed to protect sensitive information related to critical infrastructure.
An individual designated by the Program Manager to act on their behalf in matters related to the PCII Program.
The Critical Infrastructure Information Act, which provides guidelines and regulations for the handling of sensitive information related to critical infrastructure.

properties.relationship_description: The PCII Program Manager oversees the activities of the Authorized Entity in relation to the PCII Program, ensuring compliance with regulations.
The Authorized Entity is a contractor that performs services for the United States Government, specifically in relation to the PCII Program.
Similar to SSI, SBU is also involved in the assignment of royalties and remunerations to the United States Government as stipulated in the Agreement.
The relationship exists because SSI is assigning all royalties and remunerations to the United States Government as part of the terms outlined in the Agreement.

Both SSI and SBU are organizations that are involved in the handling and safeguarding of sensitive information as per the agreement, suggesting a collaborative relationship in ensuring compliance with laws and regulations.

properties.entity_description: An authorized individual is a person who has been granted permission or authority to access certain information or perform specific actions within an organization, particularly in contexts involving sensitive or classified information.

properties.relationship_description: Both the Executive Order and Section 7211 establish guidelines and obligations regarding disclosures to Congress, indicating a connection in the context of employee rights and responsibilities.
Both SSI and SBU are categories of sensitive information that require protection from unauthorized disclosure.

The sensitive document requires that any derivative products created from it must carry forward the same restrictions and markings, indicating a protective relationship between the original document and its derivatives.

properties.entity_description: Derivative products are products that are created based on or derived from original documents or materials, which may also carry the same restrictions and markings as the original document.

properties.relationship_description: The sensitive document requires that any derivative products created from it must carry forward the same restrictions and markings, indicating a protective relationship between the original document and its derivatives.
The guidance provides instructions that the official follows when handling reports of security violations.

properties.entity_description: An individual or authority responsible for receiving reports of security violations.

properties.relationship_description: The speaker (I) is obligated to report security violations to the appropriate official.

properties.entity_description: Incidents involving loss, theft, misuse, or unauthorized disclosure of information.

properties.relationship_description: The guidance provides instructions that the official follows when handling reports of security violations.
The speaker (I) is obligated to report security violations to the appropriate official.
The relationship exists because SSI is assigning all royalties and remunerations to the United States Government as part of the terms outlined in the Agreement.
The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.
The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, which includes the United States Government as a party to the agreement regarding its handling and disclosure.

The United States Government may seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to enforce the terms of the Agreement, indicating a legal relationship where the government oversees compliance by the Authorized Entity.
The Department of Homeland Security is responsible for overseeing the conditions and obligations imposed upon individuals as part of the Agreement related to conditional access.
The Agreement involves the United States Government as it mentions the execution of non-disclosure agreements with the government, indicating a legal relationship between the parties.

properties.entity_description: Departments are divisions within the government that are responsible for specific areas of public policy, government function, or service delivery.
Agencies are specialized organizations within the government that carry out specific functions, often related to regulation, enforcement, or public service.

properties.relationship_description: The Court may interpret the Agreement in legal disputes, as it has the authority to adjudicate matters related to enforceability and legality of agreements.
The Agreement involves the United States Government as it mentions the execution of non-disclosure agreements with the government, indicating a legal relationship between the parties.

Section 1034 provides specific protections for military members, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act reinforces these protections, showing a direct relationship in safeguarding disclosures by military personnel.

properties.entity_description: A section of the United States Code that governs the disclosure of information to Congress by federal employees.

properties.relationship_description: Both the Executive Order and Section 7211 establish guidelines and obligations regarding disclosures to Congress, indicating a connection in the context of employee rights and responsibilities.

properties.entity_description: A law that protects military members from retaliation for reporting misconduct or violations of law.

Title 5 is a section of the United States Code that outlines various administrative procedures and regulations, including provisions related to whistleblower protections and government accountability.

properties.relationship_description: The Intelligence Identities Protection Act is related to Title 5 as both are part of the United States Code and address issues of government accountability and protection of sensitive information.
The Whistleblower Protection Act amends Title 5 of the United States Code to enhance protections for whistleblowers.
The Intelligence Identities Protection Act is related to Title 5 as both are part of the United States Code and address issues of government accountability and protection of sensitive information.
The Whistleblower Protection Act amends Title 5 of the United States Code to enhance protections for whistleblowers.
The statutes within Title 18, United States Code, include provisions that protect Government agents from disclosures that could compromise their safety and national security.

properties.entity_description: A compilation of federal laws in the United States, which includes various statutes that govern criminal offenses and procedures, including those related to national security.
A federal law aimed at preventing and controlling activities that could undermine the government, particularly during the Cold War era, including provisions for the protection of national security.

properties.relationship_description: The statutes within Title 18, United States Code, include provisions that protect Government agents from disclosures that could compromise their safety and national security.

properties.entity_description: The national legislative body of the United States, consisting of the Senate and the House of Representatives, responsible for making laws.
The federal executive department responsible for the enforcement of the law and administration of justice in the United States.

properties.relationship_description: The Agreement allows for disclosures to the Department of Justice that are essential to reporting a substantial violation of law.
The Agreement incorporates the definitions, requirements, obligations, rights, sanctions, and liabilities created by the Executive Order, making them controlling.

properties.entity_description: An individual responsible for providing information and guidance regarding the contents of the Agreement, including any relevant laws or regulations.

properties.relationship_description: The briefing officer is responsible for making available the laws, regulations, or directives referenced in the Agreement, thus providing essential information related to the document.
The Department of Homeland Security may require individuals or entities to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement to protect sensitive information related to national security and public safety.

properties.entity_description: A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is a legally binding contract that establishes a confidential relationship between parties, ensuring that sensitive information shared will not be disclosed to third parties.

properties.relationship_description: The Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995 establishes guidelines that affect how forms like DHS Form 11000-6 are created and managed, ensuring they comply with federal paperwork reduction standards.

The Department of Homeland Security is a federal agency that operates under the authority of the United States Government, thus it is overseen by the government and is responsible for implementing policies related to national security.
The signer acknowledges the category or categories of information they may have access to, indicating a direct relationship between the signer and the information categories.

The PCII program is established under the provisions of the Critical Infrastructure Information Act of 2002, which outlines the legal framework for the protection of critical infrastructure information.

The Critical Infrastructure Information Act of 2002 is included as Title II, Subtitle B of the Homeland Security Act of 2002, linking the two pieces of legislation in the context of national security.
The PCII Program Manager oversees the implementation of the PCII Procedures Manual, ensuring that the guidelines and procedures outlined in the manual are followed.
The PCII Program Manager ensures that the activities and procedures of the PCII program comply with the regulations set forth in 6 CFR Part 29.
The Department of Homeland Security is responsible for the protection and regulation of Sensitive Security Information, ensuring that it is handled according to established standards and guidelines.

Sensitive but unclassified information is related to Section 552a of Title 5 because the latter provides the legal framework that protects individual privacy rights, which is a key aspect of the sensitive but unclassified information.

Both the Executive Order and the Act of Congress are mechanisms through which the U.S. government establishes legal frameworks and policies, particularly concerning national defense and foreign policy.
The DHS categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to protect sensitive information from public disclosure.
The DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to ensure national security and public safety.
The Agreement outlines the standards and conditions for the handling and safeguarding of the information, indicating that it governs how the information should be treated.
The security indoctrination process educates individuals about the nature and protection of sensitive information.
Conditional access refers to the security measures that determine who can access sensitive information based on specific criteria.
The United States Government has the authority to establish and enforce the terms of the Agreement, which governs the access and protection of sensitive information.
Laws provide the overarching legal framework, while Regulations detail specific rules that implement those laws, indicating that Regulations are informed by the Laws.
The United States Government regulates the use and compliance of DHS Form 11000-6, which is related to information handling and safeguarding under specific agreements.
Authority is necessary for the disclosure of Information, as it determines who has the right to release sensitive data.
The authority is responsible for enforcing dissemination restrictions, ensuring that individuals comply with the rules and guidelines set forth.
The PCII Program Manager oversees the PCII program, indicating a management relationship where the manager is responsible for the program's operations and compliance.
The Authorized Entity is a contractor that performs services for the United States Government, specifically in relation to the PCII Program.
The PCII Program Manager oversees the activities of the Authorized Entity in relation to the PCII Program, ensuring compliance with regulations.

Both SSI and SBU are organizations that are involved in the handling and safeguarding of sensitive information as per the agreement, suggesting a collaborative relationship in ensuring compliance with laws and regulations.
An authorized individual is someone who has the authority to demand the return of information from individuals who have had access to it, particularly in relation to the duties associated with DHS.
Both SSI and SBU are categories of sensitive information that require protection from unauthorized disclosure.
The PCII Program Manager has the authority to authorize alterations or removals of PCII, indicating a direct relationship between the program manager and the information category.

The sensitive document requires that any derivative products created from it must carry forward the same restrictions and markings, indicating a protective relationship between the original document and its derivatives.
The speaker (I) is obligated to report security violations to the appropriate official.
The guidance provides instructions that the official follows when handling reports of security violations.
The relationship exists because SSI is assigning all royalties and remunerations to the United States Government as part of the terms outlined in the Agreement.
Similar to SSI, SBU is also involved in the assignment of royalties and remunerations to the United States Government as stipulated in the Agreement.
The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, which includes the United States Government as a party to the agreement regarding its handling and disclosure.
The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.

The United States Government may seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to enforce the terms of the Agreement, indicating a legal relationship where the government oversees compliance by the Authorized Entity.
The United States Government has the authority to enforce laws and regulations that govern the actions of the Authorized Entity in relation to sensitive information.
The Department of Homeland Security is responsible for overseeing the conditions and obligations imposed upon individuals as part of the Agreement related to conditional access.
The Agreement involves the United States Government as it mentions the execution of non-disclosure agreements with the government, indicating a legal relationship between the parties.
The Court may interpret the Agreement in legal disputes, as it has the authority to adjudicate matters related to enforceability and legality of agreements.
Both the Executive Order and Section 7211 establish guidelines and obligations regarding disclosures to Congress, indicating a connection in the context of employee rights and responsibilities.

Section 1034 provides specific protections for military members, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act reinforces these protections, showing a direct relationship in safeguarding disclosures by military personnel.
The Whistleblower Protection Act amends Title 5 of the United States Code to enhance protections for whistleblowers.
The Intelligence Identities Protection Act is related to Title 5 as both are part of the United States Code and address issues of government accountability and protection of sensitive information.
The statutes within Title 18, United States Code, include provisions that protect Government agents from disclosures that could compromise their safety and national security.
The Subversive Activities Act of 1950 includes measures that safeguard Government agents from activities that could expose them to risks associated with national security threats.
The Agreement incorporates the definitions, requirements, obligations, rights, sanctions, and liabilities created by the Executive Order, making them controlling.
The Agreement allows for disclosures to the Department of Justice that are essential to reporting a substantial violation of law.
The briefing officer is responsible for making available the laws, regulations, or directives referenced in the Agreement, thus providing essential information related to the document.
The Department of Homeland Security may require individuals or entities to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement to protect sensitive information related to national security and public safety.
The Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995 establishes guidelines that affect how forms like DHS Form 11000-6 are created and managed, ensuring they comply with federal paperwork reduction standards.

1. **Department of Homeland Security and United States Government**: The DHS operates as a federal agency under the authority of the United States Government, which oversees its functions and responsibilities related to national security.

2. **Department of Homeland Security and Agreement**: The DHS imposes conditions on individuals as part of agreements related to conditional access, ensuring compliance with specific obligations.

Overall, the Department of Homeland Security is fundamentally linked to the United States Government in its oversight and operational capacity, while also playing a pivotal role in managing agreements that dictate individual compliance within the framework of national security.

The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph highlight the regulatory framework surrounding Sensitive Security Information and related documentation:

1. **Sensitive Security Information** is regulated by the **Department of Homeland Security (DHS)**, which is tasked with ensuring that such information is managed according to established standards and guidelines. This emphasizes the DHS's critical role in safeguarding sensitive data.

2. The **Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995** plays a significant role in regulating the creation and management of forms, specifically **DHS Form 11000-6**. This act ensures that the form complies with federal standards aimed at reducing paperwork burdens, thereby streamlining processes within federal agencies.

In summary, the DHS is pivotal in overseeing Sensitive Security Information, while the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995 governs the management of specific forms to enhance efficiency and compliance within federal documentation practices.

1. **Agreement and Information**: The Agreement governs the handling and safeguarding of information, detailing the standards and conditions for its treatment.

2. **Agreement and United States Government**: The Agreement involves the United States Government, particularly in the context of executing non-disclosure agreements, indicating a formal legal relationship between the parties.

3. **Agreement and Executive Order**: The Agreement incorporates the definitions, requirements, obligations, rights, sanctions, and liabilities set forth by an Executive Order, thereby making these elements controlling within the context of the Agreement.

4. **Agreement and Department of Justice**: The Agreement permits disclosures to the Department of Justice, which are crucial for reporting significant legal violations, highlighting the Agreement's role in legal compliance.

5. **Agreement and Briefing Officer**: The briefing officer is tasked with providing essential information related to the Agreement, including relevant laws, regulations, or directives, ensuring that all parties are informed of their responsibilities.

In summary, the Agreement serves as a foundational document that governs information management, involves the U.S. Government in legal matters, incorporates executive mandates, facilitates necessary disclosures to the Department of Justice, and ensures that relevant information is accessible through the briefing officer.

The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.

community_summary.53: The CalOES Project is a significant initiative focused on infrastructure improvements, specifically involving the repairs to Westward Beach Road.
